tomorrow.network: TNT, truTV, HBO MAX, CBC, SN, TVAS

mlb.headline: Josh Jung hits tiebreaking single in 9th inning as Rangers rally for 5-4 win over Rockies
mlb.summary: — Josh Jung hit a go-ahead single in the ninth inning, Ezequiel Duran and Jake Burger connected for back-to-back home runs, and the Texas Rangers rallied past the Colorado Rockies 5-4 on Wednesday.

mlb.headline: Braves activate White from IL, designate Azocar for assignment
mlb.summary: Braves outfielder Eli White was activated from the seven-day concussion injured list on Wednesday, and Jose Azocar, who hit .333 since being called up from Triple-A Gwinnett on May 12, was designated

mlb.headline: Blue Jays' Jose Berrios undergoes Tommy John surgery
mlb.summary: José Berríos underwent a full Tommy John surgery on his right elbow Wednesday, sidelining the veteran Blue Jays starter well into the 2027 season.

mlb.headline: Athletics' Gunnar Hoglund has hip surgery, won't pitch this season
mlb.summary: Athletics right-hander Gunnar Hoglund, who went 1-3 with a 6.40 ERA in six starts as a rookie in 2025, won't pitch this season as he recovers from hip surgery.

nhl.headline: U.S. beats Germany in shootout at ice hockey worlds
nhl.summary: Ryan Leonard scored the decisive penalty for the United States in a 4-3 shootout win over Germany at the ice hockey world championship on Wednesday.

nhl.headline: Lindy Ruff gets 2-year extension after Sabres' breakthrough season
nhl.summary: The Buffalo Sabres have rewarded coach Lindy Ruff with a two-year contract extension after the 66-year old led Buffalo back to the NHL playoffs, ending a league-leading 14-year postseason appearance d

nhl.headline: Emily Kaplan details Avs' 'big loss' with Cale Makar out for Game 1
nhl.summary: Emily Kaplan joins "SportsCenter" to report on Cale Makar's absence for the Avalanche's Game 1 matchup against the Golden Knights.

nhl.headline: Hurricanes' 11-day Stanley Cup playoffs layoff most since 1919
nhl.summary: The Hurricanes, who swept their first two playoff series, will have gone 11 full days without a game prior to Game 1 vs. the Canadiens -- the longest layoff since 1919.

nhl.headline: Avs star defender Makar out Game 1 of Western Conference finals
nhl.summary: Avalanche star defenseman Cale Makar will miss Game 1 of the Western Conference finals against the Golden Knights on Wednesday.

nba.headline: Spurs' De'Aaron Fox (ankle) out again for Game 2 vs. Thunder
nba.summary: Spurs starting guard De'Aaron Fox will sit out his second consecutive game Wednesday night against the Thunder because of a right high ankle sprain.

tennis.headline: French Open players plan media protest over prize money share
tennis.summary: Players at the French Open are planning to reduce media appearances ahead of the start of the Grand Slam to complain about their share of the prize money.

tennis.headline: French Open 2026: How to watch, schedule, prize money, Brit watch
tennis.summary: Find out all you need to know about the 2026 Australian Open in the UK, with dates, TV information, prize money and more.

tennis.headline: Carlos Alcaraz pulls out of Wimbledon because of wrist injury
tennis.summary: Two-time Wimbledon champion Carlos Alcaraz on Tuesday said he is pulling out of the grass-court Grand Slam event next month because of his lingering wrist injury.

tennis.headline: Sinner outlasts rain, Medvedev to make Italian Open final vs. Ruud
tennis.summary: Jannik Sinner overcame Mother Nature and Daniil Medvedev to advance to Sunday's Italian Open final against Casper Ruud.

tennis.headline: Casper Ruud reaches Rome final; Sinner-Medvedev halted for rain
tennis.summary: Casper Ruud withstood a lengthy rain delay to rout Italy's Luciano Darderi and reach the Italian Open final. The other semifinal match between Jannik Sinner and Daniil Medvedev was suspended due to ra
